requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 / IEC 63056 as International Baseline for Samoa BESS Project Acceptance; MCIL Conformity Regime
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619 / IEC 63056作为萨摩亚BESS项目验收国际基准；MCIL合格评定制度
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619 / IEC 63056作為薩摩亞BESS項目驗收國際基準；MCIL合格評定制度

summary.en: Samoa does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety standard or a strong dedicated product conformity regime for stationary battery energy storage systems. The Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Labour (MCIL) administers trade and product standards under the Commerce Act 1973 and related legislation, but a specific mandatory BESS pre-market certification requirement has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. This gap should be flagged honestly: MCIL's standards and conformity regime is limited in scope compared to regimes in Australia, New Zealand, or the EU, and exporters should not assume a mandatory type-approval process exists without direct verification with MCIL. Notwithstanding the absence of a confirmed mandatory product standard, IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety baseline for lithium BESS cells and modules. Donor-funded projects (ADB, World Bank, GCF, JICA, New Zealand Aid, Australian Aid) that supply BESS to Samoa typically require IEC 62619 compliance in project technical specifications and procurement documentation. IEC 63056:2020 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements) is also referenced for stationary energy storage applications. Exporters must verify the current MCIL product scope directly before shipment.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全标准，也没有针对固定式储能电池系统的强有力的专门产品合格评定制度。商业、工业和劳工部（MCIL）依据1973年《商业法》及相关法规管理贸易和产品标准，但截至本数据集日期，从可公开获取的官方来源尚未确认具体的强制性BESS产品上市前认证要求。此差距应如实标注：与澳大利亚、新西兰或欧盟的制度相比，MCIL的标准和合格评定制度范围有限，出口商不应在未直接向MCIL核实的情况下假设存在强制型式审批流程。尽管尚无经确认的强制性产品标准，IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）仍是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全基准。向萨摩亚供应BESS的捐助方资助项目（亚开行、世界银行、GCF、JICA、新西兰援助、澳大利亚援助）通常在项目技术规格和采购文件中要求IEC 62619合规。IEC 63056:2020（固定式储能系统用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）也被引用于固定式储能应用。出口商须在出货前直接向MCIL核实现行产品范围。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全標準，也沒有針對固定式儲能電池系統的強有力的專門產品合格評定制度。商業、工業和勞工部（MCIL）依據1973年《商業法》及相關法規管理貿易和產品標準，但截至本數據集日期，從可公開獲取的官方來源尚未確認具體的強制性BESS產品上市前認證要求。此差距應如實標注：與澳大利亞、新西蘭或歐盟的制度相比，MCIL的標準和合格評定制度範圍有限，出口商不應在未直接向MCIL核實的情況下假設存在強制型式審批流程。儘管尚無經確認的強制性產品標準，IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）仍是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全基準。向薩摩亞供應BESS的捐助方資助項目（亞開行、世界銀行、GCF、JICA、新西蘭援助、澳大利亞援助）通常在項目技術規格和採購文件中要求IEC 62619合規。IEC 63056:2020（固定式儲能系統用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）也被引用於固定式儲能應用。出口商須在出貨前直接向MCIL核實現行產品範圍。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Samoa project specifications and donor-funded procurement)
IEC 63056:2020 — Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements (referenced for stationary BESS applications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
MCIL — Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Labour (Samoa) — product standards and conformity authority; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific standard as of dataset date — verify directly with MCIL
Commerce Act 1973 (Samoa) — primary legislation under which MCIL administers trade and product standards

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. GB/T 34131-2023 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management System for Electrical Energy Storage) governs BMS safety requirements. GB 38031-2020 (Electric Vehicles — Traction Battery Safety Requirements) is sometimes referenced for cell safety testing in EES context, though it primarily targets traction applications. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 or IEC 63056 and are not accepted as substitutes in Samoa project or donor-agency technical specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 (and where required IEC 63056) test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB/T 34131-2023（电化学储能系统电池管理系统技术要求）管控BMS安全要求。GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）有时被引用于EES场景中的电芯安全测试，但其主要针对牵引应用。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619或IEC 63056协调，不被萨摩亚项目或捐助机构技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619（及如需的IEC 63056）测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB/T 34131-2023（電化學儲能系統電池管理系統技術要求）管控BMS安全要求。GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）有時被引用於EES場景中的電芯安全測試，但其主要針對牽引應用。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619或IEC 63056協調，不被薩摩亞項目或捐助機構技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619（及如需的IEC 63056）測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB/T 34131-2023 — 电化学储能系统电池管理系统技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management System for Electrical Energy Storage)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Electric Vehicles — Traction Battery Safety Requirements; primarily traction, sometimes referenced for EES cell safety)

gap.en: Gap: Samoa's MCIL conformity regime is limited in scope; a confirmed mandatory BESS pre-market certification requirement has not been identified as of the dataset date — exporters must verify directly with MCIL before shipment and must not assume no obligation exists. Regardless of MCIL mandatory scope, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical evidence for BESS cell and module safety in project specifications and donor-funded procurement documentation for Samoa. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes. Exporters should: (a) verify the current MCIL product regulatory scope with MCIL directly to confirm any mandatory pre-shipment obligation; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Samoa BESS projects; (c) where IEC 63056 is referenced in project specifications (particularly for stationary-specific cell safety), obtain separate IEC 63056 evidence; (d) confirm applicable IEC standard editions referenced in the project specification or donor procurement documents before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 差距：萨摩亚MCIL合格评定制度范围有限；截至本数据集日期，尚未确认强制性BESS上市前认证要求——出口商须在出货前直接向MCIL核实，不得假设不存在义务。无论MCIL强制范围如何，IEC 62619均是萨摩亚项目规格和捐助方资助采购文件中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）直接向MCIL核实现行MCIL产品监管范围，确认是否存在强制装运前义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至萨摩亚BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）若项目规格引用IEC 63056（尤其针对固定式专属电芯安全），须取得单独的IEC 63056证据；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或捐助方采购文件中引用的适用IEC标准版本。
gap.zht: 差距：薩摩亞MCIL合格評定制度範圍有限；截至本數據集日期，尚未確認強制性BESS上市前認證要求——出口商須在出貨前直接向MCIL核實，不得假設不存在義務。無論MCIL強制範圍如何，IEC 62619均是薩摩亞項目規格和捐助方資助採購文件中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）直接向MCIL核實現行MCIL產品監管範圍，確認是否存在強制裝運前義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至薩摩亞BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）若項目規格引用IEC 63056（尤其針對固定式專屬電芯安全），須取得單獨的IEC 63056證據；（d）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或捐助方採購文件中引用的適用IEC標準版本。

mandatory_status.target: Uncertain — no confirmed mandatory BESS product safety certification requirement has been identified under MCIL as of the dataset date; verify directly with MCIL; IEC 62619 evidence is effectively mandatory in project practice for donor-funded BESS procurement in Samoa
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; not transferable to Samoa

source.publisher: Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Labour (MCIL), Government of Samoa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Samoa's MCIL conformity regime is limited in scope; no confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety standard has been identified as of the dataset date — verify the current MCIL regulatory scope directly before shipment. Regardless of MCIL mandatory scope, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Samoa project specifications and donor-funded procurement. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 alone are not sufficient for project acceptance. Obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Where IEC 63056 is referenced in project documents, obtain separate evidence. Verify with MCIL and the project owner before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 萨摩亚MCIL合格评定制度范围有限；截至本数据集日期，尚未确认独立强制性BESS产品安全标准——出货前须直接向MCIL核实现行监管范围。无论MCIL强制范围如何，IEC 62619均是萨摩亚项目规格和捐助方资助采购中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足项目验收要求。须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据。若项目文件引用IEC 63056，须取得单独证据。出货前请向MCIL及项目业主核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 薩摩亞MCIL合格評定制度範圍有限；截至本數據集日期，尚未確認獨立強制性BESS產品安全標準——出貨前須直接向MCIL核實現行監管範圍。無論MCIL強制範圍如何，IEC 62619均是薩摩亞項目規格和捐助方資助採購中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足項目驗收要求。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據。若項目文件引用IEC 63056，須取得單獨證據。出貨前請向MCIL及項目業主核實。
